creator: walkingshadow@grummel.net
text:
This is the FreeBSD port of the AROS SDK.
AROS is the Amiga(TM) Research Operating System. It started out as an open source rewrite of
AmigaOS 3.1 but it actually improves a lot on the original Amiga OS by now.
The SDK provides you with a toolchain to write your owne AROS native programs.
